name: PushEngage
description: PushEngage — Web push notification platform for e-commerce and content sites with cart abandonment, browse abandonment, and drip campaigns.

seo.title: PushEngage — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: PushEngage: PushEngage — Web push notification platform for e-commerce and content sites with cart abandonment, browse abandonment, and drip campaigns.

when_to_use: Cart abandonment push notifications for e-commerce stores
Browse abandonment re-engagement for content sites
Drip web push campaigns for subscriber nurturing

pros: Strong e-commerce playbooks out of the box
Cart and browse abandonment flows prebuilt
cons: Web push only — no mobile app support
Pricing scales by subscriber, not sends
Dashboard can lag with large lists
review.verdict: A default choice for Shopify/WooCommerce stores chasing cart recovery via web push; ignore for native apps.
review.best_for: E-commerce sites running cart abandonment and drip web push

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
